experience.title: Full Stack Developer Intern
bullets: Engineered production AI agent platform processing 1,000+ B2B orders across 7 enterprise clients: multi-channel data ingestion (webhooks, WhatsApp, email, phone), Claude Sonnet LLM integration with RAG vector-store retrieval, and end-to-end feature ownership from design through deployment

Built scalable internal tooling with React and Python for operations teams: Intercom ticketing system (5+ min saved per request, 50+ customers), ERP sales order interface, and AWS S3 distributed storage managing 250+ files

Designed automated ML validation pipeline with human-in-the-loop QA to detect LLM failure modes; iterated on prompt engineering and vector-store correction memory, achieving precision improvements across 1,000+ production orders

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern
bullets: Developed Python software abstraction layer over Grafanalib on 3-person engineering team, reducing code complexity 83% (30+ lines to 5) for dashboard configuration
Migrated 7+ legacy monitoring dashboards across 3 production Grafana environments with comprehensive unit test coverage on the dashboard layer

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern
bullets: Building full-stack professor review platform serving 30,000+ students using TypeScript, React, Node.js, and Drizzle ORM for data persistence
Shipped review submission feature and Python GraphQL webscraper for automated course data ingestion pipeline across agile development sprints

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science and Linguistics

skills.Frameworks & Libraries: React.js, Node.js, FastAPI, Tailwind CSS, Flask, Spring Boot, LangChain
skills.AI/ML Tools: Anthropic/OpenAI/Gemini API, RAG, Prompt Engineering, Vector Stores, MCP, Scikit-Learn, MNE
skills.Data & Infrastructure: PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS (EC2/S3), Docker, Git, GitHub Actions, GCP, Linux

projects.name: Internship Matcher | React + TypeScript, FastAPI, Claude, PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS S3
bullets: Engineered production ML-powered platform at internshipmatcher.com: React + TypeScript frontend, FastAPI backend, distributed data platform (PostgreSQL relational store, Redis cache, AWS S3 object storage), and Clerk JWT authentication via JWKS

Designed dual-model AI pipeline with Claude (Haiku 4.5 for fast skill extraction, Sonnet 4.5 for deep re-ranking of top 30 to top 10) achieving 95%+ accuracy; implemented SSE-streamed progress events to React frontend for real-time updates
Optimized distributed processing of 30+ positions with 52% latency reduction (270s to 130s) via dynamic batching and prompt caching for scalable ML inference

projects.name: Sleep-PSG Scoring | React, FastAPI, MNE, Scikit-Learn, Redis, WebSockets
bullets: Built automated ML sleep-stage scoring data platform achieving 98% time reduction (2+ hrs to under 2 min) and 83% balanced accuracy, validated against clinician-labeled hypnograms from Sleep-EDF dataset
Designed asynchronous distributed EEG data pipeline with Redis + ARQ: parallel EDF parsing, spectral feature extraction, and Scikit-Learn classifier training per patient
Implemented sub-10ms WebSocket streaming to React dashboard rendering live EEG waveforms and hypnograms for real-time QA review

projects.name: Cold Leads Agent | FastAPI, Claude Haiku + Sonnet, Cal.com, Linq, Postgres
bullets: Deployed production autonomous AI agent for Bay Area real estate client: FSM-driven data pipeline with ML-based intent classification, debounce sweeper, and Cal.com auto-booking of qualified leads

Integrated distributed multi-service data platform: HMAC-signed Linq SMS webhooks, Cal.com v2 booking API, SendGrid escalation; dual-model Claude (Haiku + Sonnet) on async Postgres with Alembic schema migrations and APScheduler
Live in production auto-booking qualified leads on Cal.com, saving ~5 hrs/week of manual outreach for the client
